results.title: BhanuTeja G
highlights:
Senior AI/ML Engineer | Building AI Automation & Decision Support Systems | GenAI + ML | Python | Azure/AWS
...
Sr AI Automation Engineer at [American Electric Power](https://www.linkedin.com/company/american-electric-power)
...
Senior AI/ML Engineer with around 9 years of experience designing and delivering production-ready Machine Learning and Generative AI solutions across healthcare, life sciences, event technology, and enterprise environments. I work end-to-end from problem framing and data preparation to model development, evaluation, and deployment focused on building systems that are reliable, maintainable, and easy for teams to adopt. My core strengths include Machine Learning and LLM-powered applications, with hands-on experience in prompt engineering, structured outputs, retrieval-based patterns (RAG), embeddings, and vector search. I build Python-first solutions and regularly develop API-based services (FastAPI/REST), with practical deployment experience using Docker/Kubernetes and cloud platforms across Azure and AWS. I also value strong engineering discipline, clean code, version control, logging/monitoring, and iterative improvement based on real feedback. I’ve delivered AI/ML solutions in both enterprise and healthcare-aligned environments, collaborating closely with stakeholders to translate business needs into usable AI features and production workflows. Outside of work, I build and iterate on personal projects such as Astra AI (workflow orchestration assistant), CasePilot (legal AI with retrieval + GenAI), and Astra Guard/Safety Monitor Agent (real-time monitoring concept). I also participate in hackathons and research-style programs to sharpen rapid prototyping, evaluation, and practical AI delivery. Open to Senior AI/ML / GenAI Engineer opportunities where I can ship high-impact AI systems and grow with a strong team
...

results.title: Sashi Kumar Mallempati
highlights:
Sr. Engineer at American Electric Power
...
Sr. Engineer at [American Electric Power](https://www.linkedin.com/company/american-electric-power)
...
Holding a Master of Engineering in Electrical Engineering from Wright State University, I currently serve as a Senior Engineer at American Electric Power (AEP). My work focuses on the implementation of the Advanced Distribution Management System (ADMS) project across AEP's operating companies. Core competencies include Distribution Power Flow (DPF), Distribution Management System (DMS), and Distributed Energy Resource Management System (DERMS), along with expertise in Fault Location Isolation and Service Restoration (FLISR) and Volt/Var Optimization (VVO). At AEP, I collaborate with cross-functional teams to enhance operational efficiency and ensure reliable energy distribution. By addressing challenges such as fault detection and energy optimization, I contribute to elevating system performance and customer satisfaction. My goal is to continue fostering innovation in energy systems while promoting teamwork and leveraging diverse perspectives to deliver sustainable and impactful solutions.
...

...

- Collaborated with cross-functional teams to enhance operational efficiency and reliability in energy distribution.

results.title: Eric E.
highlights:
DevOps Engineer at [American Electric Power](https://www.linkedin.com/company/american-electric-power)
...
I’m a Cloud & DevOps Engineer focused on building secure, scalable, and automated cloud infrastructure that supports reliable application delivery and business growth. My cloud journey began at Mettler-Toledo International, where I worked as a Cloud Engineer, gaining hands-on experience designing and managing cloud environments with a strong emphasis on security, scalability, and operational efficiency. At Mettler-Toledo, I built and supported AWS infrastructure using EC2, S3, IAM, VPC, and RDS, applying best practices for networking, access control, and high availability. This role strengthened my foundation in cloud architecture, infrastructure reliability, and automation. I later transitioned to American Electric Power as a DevOps Engineer, where I focused on CI/CD automation and cloud-based deployments. I designed and maintained end-to-end CI/CD pipelines using Jenkins, Maven, SonarQube, Nexus, and Ansible, enabling automated builds, quality checks, artifact management, and consistent deployments across environments. I’m passionate about automation, infrastructure reliability, and continuous improvement, and I enjoy collaborating with development teams to streamline delivery pipelines and reduce manual effort. I also completed a coding bootcamp at The Ohio State University, further strengthening my scripting, automation, and problem-solving skills. I’m always open to connecting with professionals interested in AWS, Cloud Engineering, DevOps, CI/CD pipelines, and containerized applications. Let’s connect and exchange ideas on building resilient, cloud-native systems.
